 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gc3p","title":"Standardize PlaywrightLogger Usage","description":"## Objective
Ensure all E2E tests utilize the `PlaywrightLogger` for consistent, detailed, and debuggable test outputs.

## Scope
- Audit existing specs in `e2e/web/`.
- Refactor any tests using raw `console.log` or standard Playwright steps to use `logger.step`, `logger.info`, etc.
- Ensure screenshots are captured on failure for all critical steps.

## Criteria for Success
- All E2E tests produce structured JSONL logs.
- Test reports include screenshots for failures.

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","title":"Fix Next dev server failing when @xenova/transformers missing in semantic search","description":"Next dev server fails on startup with: 'Module not found: Can't resolve @xenova/transformers' from packages/core/src/search/semantic.ts (SpotlightSearch import chain). This blocks Playwright E2E runs and local dev. Fix should keep semantic search optional without requiring the dependency (e.g., computed import string, server-only dynamic import, or conditional load).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-13T19:56:33.466908336Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-15T15:43:32.599958272Z","closed_at":"2026-01-15T15:43:32.599958272Z","close_reason":"Fixed by aliasing optional dependency in next.config.ts","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-51i6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-13T19:56:33.471902305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gn9y","title":"EPIC: Admin Dashboard & Moderation","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-lbq.

## Overview
Admin dashboard and content moderation tools for platform management.

## Access Control
- Admin role in user_profiles (is_admin boolean or role field)
- Middleware to protect /admin routes
- Admin-only API endpoints

## Admin Dashboard Features

### 1. Overview Dashboard (/admin)
- Total users (and growth chart)
- Active subscriptions (MRR)
- Content counts (prompts, packs, skills)
- Recent signups
- Recent activity

### 2. User Management (/admin/users)
- Search/filter users
- View user details
- View user's content
- Impersonate user (careful!)
- Suspend/ban user
- Adjust subscription manually

### 3. Content Moderation (/admin/moderation)
- Queue of reported content
- Review and take action (approve, remove, warn)
- View reporter info
- Appeal handling

### 4. Featured Content (/admin/featured)
- Mark prompts/packs/skills as featured
- Manage "Prompt of the Day"
- Editor's picks curation

### 5. System Settings (/admin/settings)
- Feature flags
- Maintenance mode toggle
- Global announcements

## Database
- reports (content reports from users)
- admin_actions (audit log of admin actions)
- featured_content (featured items with positions)
- Add is_admin to user_profiles
